Frequently Asked Questions

How long does the evaluation process take?+

Most traders complete our evaluation process in 7-14 days.

What trading platforms do you support?+

We support MetaTrader 4, MetaTrader 5, cTrader, and TradingView.

How do I withdraw my profits?+

Simply submit a withdrawal request through your dashboard.

Can I use automated trading systems?+

Yes! We allow EAs, algos, and custom trading bots.
